title: Crispy French Almond Gratin
description: A savory, almond‑laden gratin with a crisp top and a tender braised base, perfect for a low‑sodium lunch.

ingredients.name: almonds
ingredients.amount: 1 cup toasted whole almonds, roughly chopped
ingredients.notes: toast in a dry pan until golden

ingredients.name: unsalted butter
ingredients.notes: divided; 1 tbsp for sautéing, 1 tbsp for finishing

ingredients.name: sea salt
ingredients.notes: optional; use a pinch if truly low‑sodium

instructions: In a medium skillet, melt 1 tbsp butter over medium heat and sauté shallots until translucent, about 3 minutes. Add sliced potatoes, sea salt, black pepper, and thyme; cook for 5 minutes, stirring to coat.
Deglaze with white wine, scraping up any browned bits; reduce for 2 minutes.
Transfer the potato mixture to a greased 9‑inch ovenproof dish. Pour heavy cream evenly over the top, then sprinkle grated Gruyère and toasted almonds.
Dot the remaining 1 tbsp butter over the surface for a glossy finish.
Bake uncovered for 30 minutes, then increase the heat to 425°F (220°C) and bake for an additional 10‑12 minutes until the top is golden and crisp.
Remove from oven and let rest 5 minutes before serving. Enjoy a crunchy, savory bite with a buttery, almond finish.
